TRÆEN OUT (main finding 1): Uno-X confirmed Thursday evening that Torstein Træen will NOT start stage 7 (formally DNS; he finished stage 6 after a roadside concussion check, but helmet-sensor data + X-rays found a concussion and multiple rib fractures — Hushovd: 'it was clear that he could not continue'). Sources: unoxteam.com (own statement) + NRK + VG + TV 2 + France24. Stage 7 summary rewritten; Træen removed from norwegianPlayers on stages 7-21. This resolves the previous run's top follow-up.

ROSTER FIX (fact-checker catch): our stage rosters were missing TWO Norwegians actually riding the Tour — Anders Halland Johannessen (Uno-X, replaced the ill Andreas Kron pre-start) and Per Strand Hagenes (Visma | Lease a Bike, Tour debutant, replaced Laporte). The cycling scout caught AHJ; the independent fact-checker AMENDED the 'five Norwegians remain' claim by finding Hagenes. Both added to norwegianPlayers on stages 7-21; six Norwegians remain in the race.

STAGE 7 TIME CORRECTED: official start 13:15 CEST (11:15Z, was estimated 13:00), finish window ~17:13-17:35 CEST — from inrng + franceletour + procyclinguk (deliberately NOT cyclingstage alone; its reliability is 0.40 in calibration.json). Confidence raised to high (3 agreeing sources), 'Starttidspunkt anslått' marker removed. Stage 8/9 times remain estimates — follow up.
